name: Kualoa Beach Park
tagline: Chinaman's Hat sits right offshore, the Ko'olau mountains tower behind you — this might be the most scenic beach on the island.
parking: Large free lot right at the park
bestTime: Morning for best light on the mountains; weekdays to avoid crowds
talkStory: The view here is unreal — Mokolii (Chinaman's Hat) island is right there and you can actually kayak or wade to it at low tide if you're adventurous. The water is shallow and calm, perfect for little ones. This is right next to Kualoa Ranch so you can combo a beach day with an ATV tour or movie site visit. Bring a tent or pop-up — not a lot of natural shade near the water.
